content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.3-codex-spark-xhigh

## Summary

No correctness bug was introduced in runtime code, but the change set is incomplete for the requested feature: it only updates run bookkeeping and does not address the bead’s core lifecycle/safety behavior.

## Amendments

1. The working diff only adds workflow-tracking metadata (`.ralph-burning/projects/rlm-4/journal.ndjson:97-100`) and an `active_run.stage_resolution_snapshot` block in `.ralph-burning/projects/rlm-4/run.json:16-37`, but no implementation files were modified. As a result, the bead goal (`ralph-burning-rlm.4`) to make SIGTERM handling durable and to clean up backend subprocess trees on forced stop is still unimplemented, leaving the runtime cleanup/staleness bugs unchanged.
   Rationale: This is a functional scope gap: required code paths (`src/cli/run.rs`, backend cleanup/path handling, and `run.pid`/snapshot durability logic) are untouched, so acceptance criteria around behavior are not met.
